delete firewall policy 10

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 10

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 20
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-all-other"
        set uuid d838c2e8-32af-51f1-0b4c-80c86041ac3e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 10
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-allow-web-only"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    move 10 before 20
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 10
new entry '10' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set name "LAN-to-WAN-allow-web-only"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set action accept

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #         set nat enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (10) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 10 before 20

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 10
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-allow-web-only"
        set uuid fa9e802a-32af-51f1-77a6-3b2cfde6479e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 20
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-all-other"
        set uuid d838c2e8-32af-51f1-0b4c-80c86041ac3e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end
